'''鈭歬-ch-ch''' ('''kakachach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaden|loaden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaden|loaden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-ch-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kakachach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachach|thikachach]] || [[word:jikachach|jikachach]] || [[word:shikachach|shikachach]] || [[word:kikachach|kikachach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachach|thuthukachach]] || [[word:jujukachach|jujukachach]] || [[word:shushukachach|shushukachach]] || [[word:kukukachach|kukukachach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukachach|thukachach]] || [[word:jukachach|jukachach]] || [[word:shukachach|shukachach]] || [[word:kukachach|kukachach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukachach|thukachach]] || [[word:jukachach|jukachach]] || [[word:shukachach|shukachach]] || [[word:kukachach|kukachach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekachach|thekachach]] || [[word:jekachach|jekachach]] || [[word:shekachach|shekachach]] || [[word:kekachach|kekachach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachach|thothokachach]] || [[word:jojokachach|jojokachach]] || [[word:shoshokachach|shoshokachach]] || [[word:kokokachach|kokokachach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachach|thokachach]] || [[word:jokachach|jokachach]] || [[word:shokachach|shokachach]] || [[word:kokachach|kokachach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachach|thokachach]] || [[word:jokachach|jokachach]] || [[word:shokachach|shokachach]] || [[word:kokachach|kokachach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]] || [[word:kachach|kachach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kachach|th忙kachach]] || [[word:j忙kachach|j忙kachach]] || [[word:sh忙kachach|sh忙kachach]] || [[word:k忙kachach|k忙kachach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakachach|thathakachach]] || [[word:jajakachach|jajakachach]] || [[word:shashakachach|shashakachach]] || [[word:kakakachach|kakakachach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakachach|thakachach]] || [[word:jakachach|jakachach]] || [[word:shakachach|shakachach]] || [[word:kakachach|kakachach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachach|thakachach]] || [[word:jakachach|jakachach]] || [[word:shakachach|shakachach]] || [[word:kakachach|kakachach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakachach|shakachach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakachach|goshakachach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakachach|gokishakachach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakachachn眉|shakachachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakachachnkn眉|goshakachachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachachn眉|gokishakachachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakachachsh毛|shakachachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakachachnksh毛|goshakachachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakachachsh毛|gokishakachachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachachro|shakachachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachachnkro|goshakachachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachachro|gokishakachachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachachmu|shakachachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachachnkmu|goshakachachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachachmu|gokishakachachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakachachsher|shakachachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakachachnksher|goshakachachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakachachsher|gokishakachachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakachachng|shakachachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakachachnkng|goshakachachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakachachng|gokishakachachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakachachya|shakachachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakachachnkya|goshakachachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakachachya|gokishakachachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakachachyam|shakachachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakachachnkyam|goshakachachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakachachyam|gokishakachachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachachn眉sh毛|shakachachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachachnkn眉sh毛|goshakachachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachachn眉sh毛|gokishakachachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachachn眉ro|shakachachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachachnkn眉ro|goshakachachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachachn眉ro|gokishakachachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachachn眉mu|shakachachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachachnkn眉mu|goshakachachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachachn眉mu|gokishakachachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachachsh毛n眉|shakachachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachachnksh毛n眉|goshakachachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachachsh毛n眉|gokishakachachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachachsh毛ro|shakachachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachachnksh毛ro|goshakachachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachachsh毛ro|gokishakachachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachachsh毛mu|shakachachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachachnksh毛mu|goshakachachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachachsh毛mu|gokishakachachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachachron眉|shakachachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachachnkron眉|goshakachachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachachron眉|gokishakachachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachachrosh毛|shakachachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachachnkrosh毛|goshakachachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachachrosh毛|gokishakachachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachachromu|shakachachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachachnkromu|goshakachachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachachromu|gokishakachachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachachmun眉|shakachachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachachnkmun眉|goshakachachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachachmun眉|gokishakachachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachachmush毛|shakachachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachachnkmush毛|goshakachachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachachmush毛|gokishakachachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachachmuro|shakachachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachachnkmuro|goshakachachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachachmuro|gokishakachachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
